title: Dizzy, Burning, and Fighting for the Win

text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon, who ran in this year's Classics, is
now taking an extended break due to an injury.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This shocking news breaks right after the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I brought apples and bananas! I'll just put them
here for you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I hope you get better soon so we can run together
in our senior year!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I apologize. I don't know whether or not I'll be
able to run again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The doctor just told me that my injury will take a
long time to heal. That could mean... I might—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sure you'll get better! Don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Your attitude is really important in healing, so
make sure you stay optimistic! Okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. Thank you for your kind words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...By the way. Is Rice doing well?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: R-Rice?! She's... um...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: She's doing fantastic! Obviously!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, man... I really did it this time. I lied right to
her face when put on the spot.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...I wish Rice could have come with me to visit
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, the thing is... Today might not be a good day
for Rice to go. She's been feeling very down.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...She said she feels like it's her fault Bourbon was
injured.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! There's no way that's true!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I agree with you... I also suspect that's not the
only reason she's feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... You know how she was trying to catch up to
Bourbon during the Classics this year?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Her goal suddenly disappeared, and I think she's
at a loss for what to do now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon seemed worried too. I wish there was
some way I could help.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm... What to dooo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Nature. I wonder what she wants.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woo, Nature! Lookin' good!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser! Sorry for calling you over here while
you were out and about!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No worries! I was planning on doing some training
anyway. But what made you want to run with me
all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You've cheered me up so many times since I've
known you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I... have?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you have. Like when I was feeling down
after that scrimmage with Teio and McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Though... I could probably stand to learn a thing
or two from you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And when I was depressed after the news was
talking about the Kikuka Sho not having its
biggest star...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You just have to win so convincingly that no one
will even compare you to Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think that's your only option! You gotta
win by a landslide! So that everyone forgets
about Teio completely!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You really helped me out back then—you gave
me the strength I needed to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...And now Tokai Teio and I are both going to run
in the next Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanna give it all I've got and prove that I have
what it takes too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So before the Arima Kinen... I wanna run against
one of the Umamusume I respect the most!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature gives Matikanetannhauser a hard
slap on the back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aye yi?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm only gonna say this once! You've saved me
time and time again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're the one in my heart cheering me on and
telling me not to give up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's because you've always given me the push I
needed that I've gotten as far as I have.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You mean... I inspired you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you really did.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: It's because you're you that they're so inspired!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I want you to believe in that power more than
anyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. How about that? I really inspired you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That kinda makes me feel all warm and fuzzy.
Haha, I think I get it now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Nothing! Now come on, Nature! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: We're racing, aren't we? I'm not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two begin racing with the setting sun
behind them.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser & Nature
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They pass each other multiple times as they run,
and each time it happens, both of them pick up
the pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even from afar, I can tell they're going all out. It's
hard to believe this started as a playful match.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly notice another Umamusume watching
their race intently.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I won't lose! I won't lose! I won't lose! I CAN WIN!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser & Nature
text_block_list.text: YAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two dive for the finish line, tumble on the
turf, and get lost in the colors of the sunset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Director Akikawa's hope for her has
taken root and is slowly starting to sprout.
